chunks.text: Technical Reports - Susan L. Graham. Titanium Language Reference Manual, version 2.19 (EECS-2005-15). Paul N. Hilfinger, Dan Oscar Bonachea, Kaushik Datta, David Gay, Susan L. Graham, Benjamin Robert Liblit, Geoffrey Pike, Jimmy Zhigang Su and Katherine A. Yelick. Transformational Generation of Language Plug-ins in the Harmonia Framework (CSD-05-1370). Andrew Begel, Marat Boshernitsan and Susan L. Graham.

Titanium Language Reference Manual (CSD-01-1163). Paul N. Hilfinger, Dan Bonachea, David Gay, Susan Graham, Ben Liblit, Geoff Pike and Katherine Yelick. Compiler Transformations for High-Performance Computing (CSD-93-781). David F. Bacon, Susan L. Graham and Oliver J. Sharp.

The Pan Language-Based Editing System For Integrated Development Environments (CSD-90-593). Robert A. Ballance, Susan L. Graham and Michael L. Van De Vanter. Coherent User Interfaces for Language-Based Editing Systems (CSD-90-591). Michael L. Van De Vanter, Robert A. Ballance and Susan L. Graham. The Architecture of Pan I (CSD-88-409). Robert A. Ballance, Michael L. Van De Vanter and Susan L. Graham.
